# LVN / Elvin — narrative-game engine and language

> LVN is an open engine + plain-text language (.lvns) for non-realtime 2D
> games: visual novels, CYOA, quests, point-and-click, RPG-lite, quizzes.
> Scripts read like screenplays; an AI agent writes them, a human reads and
> edits the diff. Compile: `.lvns → lvnconv → .lvn` (JSON container) →
> Unity runtime (`com.lvn.engine`, UPM) or your own host.

The quality gate for every generated script:
`lvnconv convert -i game.lvns -o game.lvn && lvnconv validate game.lvn`
(zero warnings is the bar; the validator explains fixes).

## Start here (AI agents)

- [Browser playground](docs/playground.md): write .lvns on the left, it
  plays on the right (real wasm compiler, story core incl. timers/input);
  share via URL hash or export ONE self-contained HTML file that plays
  from disk. Served at /play/; sources in panel/public/play/.
- [Human tutorial](howto/TUTORIAL.md): zero to a playing scene in 15
  minutes (server → IDE → scene → Unity sandbox live-reload).
- [Agent onboarding](howto/AGENTS.md): the mental model — language →
  converter → runtime → manifest; where everything lives.
- [Cheatsheet](howto/CHEATSHEET.md): the whole language on one page.
- [Capabilities & limits](howto/CAPABILITIES.md): every op with fields,
  verified engine limits (what does NOT work).

## Reference

- [Language reference](howto/LANGUAGE.md): full .lvns syntax.
- [.lvn container format](docs/lvn-format.md): the compiled JSON contract.
- [Recipe book](howto/recipes.md): 25+ validated patterns — inventory,
  shops, timers, text input, drag & drop, CG gallery, voice-over, dice.
- [Animation system](docs/animation-system.md): tweens, splines, bones,
  spring physics, Spine integration.
- [Placement](docs/placement.md) and [staging tags](docs/staging-tags.md).
- [Cast & characters](docs/cast.md): layered art, emotion axes, catalog.

## Genre templates (each ships a validated .lvns example)

- [All 12 genres](howto/README.md): visual-novel, gamebook, point-and-click,
  rpg, clicker, dating-sim, quiz, detective, tycoon, roguelike,
  kinetic-novel, puzzle.
- Reference builds beyond the genres: [novella-core](howto/novella-core/)
  (the five bricks of a modern story novel: stat gates, paid choices,
  wardrobe, timers, global stats) and [time-romance](howto/time-romance/)
  (hub/collections library layout, title unlock/cost, chapter energy).

## MCP server (agents: prefer this over raw CLI)

- [lvn-mcp](docs/mcp.md): the toolchain as an MCP server — `lvns_check`
  (compile+validate quality gate), `lvns_convert`, `lvn_doc`. Build:
  `go build ./tools/lvnconv/cmd/lvn-mcp`.

## Product services (optional backend)

- [Services](docs/services.md): anonymous device auth, server-authoritative
  wallet + IAP verify, append-only analytics — modular Go services in the
  content server, Unity clients in `Lvn.Services` (LvnBackend / LvnWallet /
  LvnAnalytics). Fully optional; games play offline without them.

## Embedding & operations

- [Embedding the engine](docs/embedding.md): three entry levels, custom ops
  (LvnOps/ext), menu items, events, meta-progress stores.
- [Unity quickstart](docs/unity-getting-started.md).
- [Releasing & compatibility contract](docs/releasing.md): formats only
  grow within a major version; saves migrate.
